title: D&D 2024 Eldritch Invocations
description: Schema for data/eldritch_invocations.json. Top-level keys are invocation names; values describe the prerequisite chain and free-form text. Most current invocations carry no effects/choices because their benefits are in-play (e.g. cast a spell without a slot); Phase 7 (D0-1) will add effects for the static-benefit invocations (e.g. Eldritch Mind, Devil's Sight) without changing this schema.
